summary: Additionally; the Computers Skill allows player t0 hack

mechanics.name_guess: Additionally; the Computers Skill allows player t0 hack
mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 099 > locations > Additionally; the Computers Skill allows player t0 hack
mechanics.excerpt: Additionally; the Computers Skill allows player t0 hack into computer systems by making Computers Skill Check: If system operator (sysop} is online when character attempts t0 hack into system; an Opposed Test is instead made using the character' = and sysop'$ Computers Skills If the sysop wins the would-be hacker is forced offline ad any further attempts on the same system receive +2 modifier: the hacking character wins he breaks into the system; but the sysop may be aware of the intrusion.
